headlines.title: Anthropic will make Claude Cowork available to users via the cloud
headlines.description: The leading AI company announced its move from a laptop-based system to one that allows users to use Cowork throughout the day and across devices.

headlines.title: Tilly Norwood, AI ‘actor’ denounced by actors union, to star in feature film
headlines.description: Tilly Norwood creator Particle6 Productions said the movie will be a comedy-drama called “Misaligned.”

headlines.title: Waymo cars stranded on San Francisco streets as July Fourth gridlock drains batteries
headlines.description: “Major traffic disruptions, a high volume of travelers, and unplanned road closures contributed to unexpected congestion,” Waymo said.

headlines.title: U.S. launches retaliatory airstrikes after Iran attacks commercial ships
headlines.description: The U.S. launched retaliatory airstrikes on Iran after the Iranian regime violated the ceasefire and targeted commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.

headlines.title: Platner faces growing calls to drop out after rape allegation
headlines.description: Maine Democratic Senate nominee Graham Platner is facing growing calls to drop out of the race after he was accused of rape. He denies the allegation. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports.

headlines.title: How to Be a Tech-Savvy Traveler to Save Time and Money
headlines.description: Long lines, crowded airports and high gas prices can all make trips challenging but with a little planning, there are ways to save time and money. NBC’s Brian Cheung joins TODAY to share how to become a tech savvy traveler. Tips include using digital IDs, getting deals from credit card travel portals and more.

headlines.title: Starbucks will pay baristas to create TikToks
headlines.description: Starbucks is partnering with TikTok to launch a new Creator Network, paying some baristas for content they create for the platform and a cut of ad revenue. NBC News' Ryan Chandler reports.

headlines.title: New Warning About Fake Invitation Scam: Here’s What to Know
headlines.description: The FTC is warning about a new came of fake party invitations making the rounds in your emails and texts that could be phishing for your personal information. NBC’s Vicky Nguyen joins TODAY to break down how to protect yourself and spot bogus RSVPs.

headlines.title: Flock's A.I.-enabled street cameras see backlash as more communities cancel contracts
headlines.description: Activists are speaking out against new, A.I.-enabled cameras being used by municipalities across the country. Critics argue the technology is creating a mass surveillance network that can be accessed by federal immigration agencies. NBC News' Dana Griffin reports.

headlines.title: AI is helping families reunite with their beloved missing pets
headlines.description: Every year, thousands of pets go missing on July Fourth. But, the non-profit Petco Love Lost says their patented AI database has helped over 250,000 pets get reunited with their families for free. NBC News' Marquise Francis reports.

headlines.title: Buying Refurbished Tech? Avoid These Major Mistakes
headlines.description: Buying refurbished and second-hand items can save you some money but is it a safe investment? NBC’s Brian Cheung joins TODAY to share important do’s and don’ts and how to avoid being scammed.

headlines.title: AI-powered robots are new tech searching ocean floors for mines
headlines.description: An exclusive look at Greensea IQ's AI-powered robots that can find and clear mines on the ocean floor. A powerful new tool that minimizes the human risk of deactivating these deadly hazards. NBC News' Brian Cheung reports.
